case_title: ERIN GARDERE et al VS. MARGARET S CHUA et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUA, MARGARET S HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MARGARET CHUA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY PROVIDED A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE HEARING. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: RHONDA FUNG, CSR # 4819
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-10-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
